title: Clippit Word build manifest
description: Manifest consumed by `clippit word build run` to merge multiple .docx sources into a single document.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor validation and completion.

output.description: Output .docx path. Relative paths resolve against the manifest file directory.

entries.description: Ordered entries. Each entry is either a string shorthand or an object with explicit options.

oneOf.description: String shorthand: `[Section Name]` creates a logical section label; any other value is a source .docx file path.

section.description: Name of a logical section label (no content is added to the document).

file.description: Source .docx file path. Relative paths resolve against the manifest file directory.

start.description: 0-based index of the first body element to copy. Defaults to 0 (beginning of document).

count.description: Maximum number of body elements to copy. Defaults to all remaining elements.

keepSections.description: When true, preserve this source document's section structure in the merged output.

discardHeadersAndFootersInKeptSections.description: When keepSections is true, discard the source document's headers and footers.
